concepts.headline: Structure beats substance. Every time.
concepts.subtext: Analysis of 10,000 LinkedIn posts. The clearest structure wins, not the best insight.
concepts.layout_description: Centered statement composition on warm off-white #faf9f6 canvas. The headline sits at the vertical center, bold 52px weight 600, letter-spacing -0.04em, color #111. A 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) spans 80px wide, horizontally centered, positioned 28px above the headline as a typographic breath. Subtext at 17px weight 400 color #555 sits 32px below the headline, max-width 480px, centered. FLYWHEEL watermark at 160px bold uppercase, opacity 0.03, centered behind all content. Particle dot cluster at top-right corner, 6 dots at 3-5px, opacity 0.10, with hairline 0.5px connectors. Brand mark bottom-center at 11px DM Mono uppercase letter-spacing 0.07em, color #888. 80px padding all edges. Sacred negative space dominates top and bottom thirds.
concepts.color_usage: Background #faf9f6, headline #111, subtext #555, accent bar #d7c8af, watermark #000 at 0.03 opacity, brand mark #888, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.10 opacity
concepts.reasoning: The post itself makes a single bold declarative claim. A bold_statement_card mirrors the content's own structure: one punchy truth, nothing else. The centered composition with generous negative space enacts the very argument being made, that structure and clarity outperform density.

concepts.headline: Clarity is the engagement strategy.
concepts.subtext: From 10,000 posts analyzed: visual structure, a strong hook, and a readable pattern outperform insight alone.
concepts.layout_description: Left-anchored hero layout on white #ffffff canvas. Content block anchors to the left edge with 64px left padding. A thin 2px warm sand accent bar (#d7c8af) spans 56px horizontally at the very top of the content column, fading to transparent at its right edge, positioned 48px from canvas top. Eyebrow label in DM Mono 11px uppercase letter-spacing 0.08em color #888 reads '10,000 POSTS ANALYZED' sitting 20px below the accent bar. Headline at 48px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.03em color #111 sits 16px below the eyebrow, max-width 520px, left-aligned. A 1px structural border #e5e5e5 divides headline from subtext, spanning 320px, 24px below headline. Subtext at 18px weight 400 color #555 sits 20px below the divider, max-width 480px. Right half of canvas holds a particle dot network: 12 scattered circles 2-6px at opacity 0.08, connected by 0.5px hairline strokes, occupying roughly 560-1150px horizontal range. Flywheel brand mark at bottom-left, 11px DM Mono uppercase, color #888. 64px bottom padding.
concepts.color_usage: Background #ffffff, eyebrow #888, headline #111, divider #e5e5e5, subtext #555, accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.08 opacity, brand mark #888
concepts.reasoning: The left-anchored hero with a clear hierarchy of eyebrow, headline, and subtext demonstrates exactly what the post advocates: visual structure that the eye can follow. The stat in the eyebrow grounds the authority claim without cluttering the composition.

concepts.headline: The clearest post wins, not the smartest.
concepts.subtext: Structure, hooks, and visual rhythm drive engagement. Substance alone does not.
concepts.layout_description: Left-heavy composition on card surface #f0efe9 canvas. Content occupies the left 55% of the canvas starting at 64px left padding. A large typographic quotation mark in Inter weight 700 at 140px sits at top-left of the content zone, color #000 at opacity 0.04, anchoring the upper-left. Headline in 46px weight 600 letter-spacing -0.04em color #111 sits below, max-width 540px, left-aligned. Subtext at 17px weight 400 color #666 sits 28px below the headline, max-width 460px. A warm sand accent bar 2px wide by 48px tall runs vertically along the left edge of the content block, color #d7c8af, aligned with the headline's top. Right 40% of canvas is pure negative space with a single particle dot scatter: 8 circles 2-5px at opacity 0.07, no connectors, drifting toward the right edge. Brand mark bottom-left at 11px DM Mono uppercase letter-spacing 0.07em color #888. Warm sand shadow rgba(215,200,175,0.25) 0px 4px 20px on the overall card surface at the bottom edge.
concepts.color_usage: Background #f0efe9, quotation mark #000 at 0.04 opacity, headline #111, subtext #666, vertical accent bar #d7c8af, particle dots #6b7a7c at 0.07 opacity, brand mark #888
concepts.reasoning: The pull_quote modality isolates the post's core provocation as a single memorable line. The vertical warm sand bar and oversized ghost quotation mark add editorial character without clutter, consistent with a premium publication aesthetic.

selection_reasoning: The bold_statement_card best embodies Flywheel's editorial restraint. It enacts the post's own argument through its design: maximum clarity, minimum elements, one undeniable truth. The centered composition with the FLYWHEEL watermark, sparse particle dots, and generous negative space achieves the museum-exhibit-label quality that defines the brand. It is the most typographically confident of the three and leaves no doubt about its singular message.
